creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
I need to reopen this, since this is the very last port in the tree
using lang/gcc11.

GCC 11 went end-of-life upstream about a year ago, so it's overdue to
deprecate it (and get it removed thereafter).


Looking at https://github.com/d-m-bailey/cvc/issues/239 there appears
to be a patch that may address the build issue with newer GCC?

The last commit on https://github.com/d-m-bailey/cvc/commits/master/ reads 
  Merge pull request #264 from d-m-bailey/clang13
  d-m-bailey authored Dec 28, 2024

So I hope this can be built with clang 13 (maybe even later)?
